name: Daji

skills.name: Captivate
skills.description: Skill hits reduce the enemy's Magical Defense (up to 3 stacks).

skills.name: Soul Impact
skills.description: Unleashes a shockwave in the target direction, dealing damage.

skills.name: Strike a Pose
skills.description: Casts a love spell at the target, dealing damage and stunning them.

skills.name: Heartbreaker
skills.description: Deals damage to random enemies within range 5 times.

skillsZh.name: 失心
skillsZh.description: 技能命中可降低敵人法術防禦(最多三層)。

skillsZh.name: 靈魂衝擊
skillsZh.description: 朝指定方向發射衝擊波，對敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 偶像魅力
skillsZh.description: 向目標敵人發射愛心，造成傷害和暈眩效果。

skillsZh.name: 女王崇拜
skillsZh.description: 將5次傷害隨機分配給範圍內的敵人。

tips: Build: Void Staff, Ardent Dominion, Sage's Tome.
tipsZh: 妲己（中路）：梯度 S+，勝率 51.64%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：虛無法杖、熾熱支配、賢者天書.

patchHistory.change: Reduced skill cooldown and enhanced the range and casting mechanics of her Skill 1
patchHistory.detail: "Daji is a mage that can deal impressive amounts of burst damage against single targets. However, whether she can obtain enough resources in the early game often determines her overall performance in the match. In order to help her along, we've shortened her skill cooldowns so that she can pull off more kills in the early game."

patchHistoryZh.change: 降低技能冷卻，提升了1技能的距離和施放手感
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「妲己作為具有單體高爆發的法師，在前期能否獲得足夠的經濟，往往決定整場戰局的表現；因此我們適當縮短前期技能冷卻，讓她能有更多嘗試獲得擊殺的機會。」

faqs.question: Is Daji good in current season?
faqs.answer: Daji is Tier S+ Mage with 51.64% win rate, 2.42% pick rate, and 3.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Daji build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Void Staff, Ardent Dominion, Sage's Tome, Sage's Sanctuary, Splendor, Venomous Staff.

faqs.question: How to counter Daji?
faqs.answer: Pick Gao Changgong, Mulan. Strong into Luna, Diaochan.

faqsZh.question: 妲己 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 妲己 為 S+ 梯度，勝率 51.64%、選取 2.42%、禁用 3.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 妲己 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：虛無法杖、熾熱支配、賢者天書、賢者的庇護、輝月、夢魘之牙.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 妲己？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Gao Changgong、Mulan。妲己 克制 Luna、Diaochan。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Luna, Diaochan. Weak into: Gao Changgong, Mulan.

guide.overview: Daji is a Medium Mage (Mid Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S+ with 51.0% win rate and 2.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Daji: Skill hits reduce the enemy's Magical Defense (up to 3 stacks).
guide.bestBuild: Rush Scepter of Reverberation, Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, then complete Void Staff, Splendor. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Nightmare for stats that match Daji's Mage kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Soul Impact → Strike a Pose → Heartbreaker → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Soul Impact, and Heartbreaker on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Soul Impact → Strike a Pose → Heartbreaker → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Mid Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Control first wave without taking free poke. Roam after pushing wave 2–4 to side lanes with your jungler.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Daji is a Tier S+ staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Ban rate 3.1% — expect Daji to be removed in tryhard lobbies; have a backup in the same role.
comparisons: Daji vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.8% more often globally. Choose Daji when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

Daji vs Wang Zhaojun (Mage, Tier S): Wang Zhaojun is 1.9% pick / 51.2% WR. Wang Zhaojun wins 0.2% more often globally. Choose Daji when you need Mid Lane identity; choose Wang Zhaojun for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Daji excels into Luna, Diaochan. Avoid blind picking into Gao Changgong, Mulan without team peel.
